title: 2026 Academy Awards: Best Actress Nominees
text: The 98th Academy Awards ceremony profiles the five best actress nominees. Jessie Buckley portrays Agnes, wife of William Shakespeare, in this adaptation of Maggie O'Farrell's novel. The Irish actress previously received an Oscar nomination for The Lost Daughter. She explained her approach to challenging scenes, noting she just needs to be in nature and start her day and wake up that way, then go to the set and see what came out. Rose Byrne delivers a dramatic performance as Linda, a struggling mother facing mounting crises in If I Had Legs I'd Kick You. Known for comedic roles in Bridesmaids and Spy, Byrne earned her first Oscar nomination for this dramatic turn. Kate Hudson stars as Claire Sardina in Song Sung Blue, a musical biopic about a Neil Diamond tribute act. A CBS Sunday Morning profile of Hudson's music career caught the attention of actor Hugh Jackman, who recommended her for the role. Renate Reinsve earned her first Academy Award nomination for Sentimental Value, playing Nora. Emma Stone reunites with director Yorgos Lanthimos for Bugonia, a dark comedy about a pharmaceutical executive kidnapped by conspiracy theorists.
